claim_text: We introduce the Hierarchical Seating Allocation Problem (HSAP) which addresses the optimal assignment of hier-archically structured organizational teams to physical seat-ing arrangements on a floor plan.
evidence_text: We introduce the Hierarchical Seating Allocation Problem (HSAP) which addresses the optimal assignment of hier-archically structured organizational teams to physical seat-ing arrangements on a floor plan.

claim_text: To alleviate this manual process, we propose an end-to-end framework to solve the HSAP.
evidence_text: To alleviate this manual process, we propose an end-to-end framework to solve the HSAP.

claim_text: We demonstrate our approach under dif-ferent sized instances by evaluating the PRM framework and subsequent allocations both quantitatively and qualitatively.
evidence_text: We demonstrate our approach under dif-ferent sized instances by evaluating the PRM framework and subsequent allocations both quantitatively and qualitatively.
